name: Steak and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the steak with salt and pepper.
2. Dip the steak in flour, shaking off any excess.
3. Fry the steak until browned on all sides.
4. Transfer the steak to a crock pot.
5. Add water, cream of mushroom soup, and onion gravy mix to the crock pot.
6. Cover and cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
7. Serve with mashed potatoes or rice.
